title: Front Office Manager - Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
company: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions!
